violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ceiling tiles have stains from previous water damage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

The ceiling throughout establishment is in poor repair. Inspector observed missing tiles. Per interview with PIC, ceiling is in process of being redone. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
